Phase-17.NAME: Full Tunnel Simplification
Phase-17.goal: Replace complex Split-Tunneling logic with simple Full Tunnel architecture. All client traffic (0.0.0.0/0) routes via DE server. Remove ipset, DNS observer, and policy resolvers.
Phase-17.step-3: Simplify Deploy Scripts - Remove ipset creation, mangle chains, cron jobs from deploy-on-server.sh. - Configure simple FORWARD on RU and NAT on DE. - Delete scripts/update_ru_ips.py.
Phase-17.step-4: Frontend Cleanup - Remove "Route Topology" card (Entry -> Exit). - Remove Split-Tunneling status/RU IP Range. - Simplify Server info to "Connected". - Files: frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx, Config.tsx, i18n/index.ts.
Phase-17.step-5: Admin Panel Cleanup - Remove Domain/CIDR policy management UI. - Remove Route Decision inspection tools. - Remove DNS Observer stats. - Clean API calls in frontend-admin.
Phase-17.step-6: Update MyGRACE Docs - Update graph-index.xml (remove M-013..M-016). - Update M-007 contract (Full Tunnel). - Update V-M-017 verification scenarios.

phase-gates.gate-1: YouTube and Google are accessible via VPN on client.
phase-gates.gate-2: Deploy scripts run without errors on clean servers.
phase-gates.gate-3: No references to 'split-tunneling' or 'ipset' remain in source.
